title: anthemis marocana subsp. marocana
intro: Anthemis marocana subsp. marocana, also known as Moroccan chamomile, is a subspecies of the Anthemis marocana plant, belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is a perennial herb used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Moroccan chamomile include soothing digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and promoting restful sleep. Herbal preparations of Anthemis marocana subsp. marocana can be found in the form of teas, essential oils, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including insomnia and gastrointestinal problems.
